text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono seems more nervous than usual
today. To hone her focus, she conducts a sumo
ritual and prepares for victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's brimming with determination as she heads
off to face the Swan S.!
